summary.narrative: Evans campaigned on transparency, economic development for youth, gun violence reduction, housing investment, and bridge-building. Re-elected 2025 on platform emphasizing public safety gains, affordable housing, and economic empowerment.
summary.grade_rationale: Demonstrated measurable progress on public safety (shooting/crime reductions) and economic development (Constellation Brands, Inner Loop investment). Housing and youth employment outcomes less clearly documented. Transparency gains unclear.

promises.normalized: Reduce gun violence through enforcement against illegal firearms
Create economic development & job opportunities for youth
Develop and increase affordable housing inventory
Restore transparency and build bridges in city government

data_gaps: Specific quantitative youth employment outcomes and program metrics
Detailed breakdown of affordable housing units created vs. promised
Transparency initiatives documentation and measurable improvements
Attribution clarity on Constellation Brands move to local policy vs. external factors
Inner Loop investment specifics and completion status
Gun violence emergency order effectiveness data and timeline
First term accomplishments relative to initial campaign promises
Engagement data on bridge-building governance initiatives
